text: Windows: papercuts needs HOME=USERPROFILE or --file; run from git repo root

Windows PowerShell 5.1: UTF-8 em-dash in .ps1 strings -> ParserError (broke bootstrap). Also dollar-exit-colon is drive-qualified var -> use dollar{exit}. Mitigated: ASCII punctuation, parse-check-ps1.ps1, smoke-bootstrap.ps1, docs note.
Compounded from live apps TG_BOT_PRO + inkavrio_ru: append AGENTS harness snippet; merge papercuts into existing hooks.json; Always refresh product-core + hook scripts.
